three_part_structure.what_they_think_problem_is: My health condition (arthritis, high blood pressure, depression, menopause, etc.) is the problem, and prescription drugs from my doctor are the solution that will help me manage or cure it safely.
three_part_structure.what_real_problem_is: The pharmaceutical industry has created a system where dangerous, deadly drugs are approved and prescribed despite causing massive casualties (100,000 heart attack deaths, cancer, suicides, blindness). Doctors unknowingly prescribe these 'time bombs' because they trust a corrupt approval system. Big Pharma prioritizes profits over safety, suppresses natural alternatives, and the medical establishment becomes complicit in mass poisoning. The drugs themselves are often MORE dangerous than the conditions they treat.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: The prescription drugs you've been taking aren't designed to heal you - they're designed to create profits through dependency while causing additional health problems that require MORE drugs. Side effects, complications, and worsening health aren't unfortunate accidents - they're predictable outcomes of drugs that were approved despite known dangers. Natural alternatives are suppressed because they can't be patented and don't create lifetime customers. You've been playing Russian roulette with your health by trusting a system designed to profit from your illness, not cure it.
